div1.entryFree:
Unrespective, 1) devoid of respect and consideration, regardless, unthinking: I will converse with iron-witted fools and u. boys, R3 IV, 2, 29.
2) seemingly == not attended with regard, used at random: the remainder viands we do not throw in u. sieve, Troil. II, 2, 71; i. e. we do not throw them unrespectively into the sewer.
